If your clothes always come out of the dryer wrinkled, try this simple trick! Just add a few ice cubes halfway through the drying cycle and let the steam help relax the wrinkles. Less ironing, more time saved! 😊

items.caption:
How to Clean Smarter, Not Harder – Part 2 ✨

These are a few of my favourite kitchen cleaning hacks that save time and make cleaning so much easier. From freshening your dishwasher to loosening stubborn oven grease and letting your dishwasher clean greasy range hood filters, these simple tricks really work!

Which one are you trying first? 🤍

#HomeHacks #CleaningTips #KitchenCleaning #CleanHome #LifeHacks

items.caption:
One of the easiest kitchen cleaning hacks! ✨ If your range hood filters are dishwasher safe, let your dishwasher do the hard work instead of scrubbing by hand. Such a simple trick that saves time and leaves them looking so much cleaner. 🤍

#CleaningTips #KitchenCleaning #HomeHacks #CleanHome #DishwasherHack

Don’t throw away leftover tomato paste! 🍅

I freeze mine in small portions so it’s always ready whenever I need it. It lasts longer, reduces food waste, and makes cooking so much easier.

#kitchenhacks #foodstorage #freezerhacks #homehacks #HomeHacksWithCarolina

items.caption:
PRIME DAY DEAL! Your home will smell amazing all day with this 🍊✨

Fill your candle warmer with hot water, then add orange and lemon slices, rosemary, cloves, star anise and a splash of vanilla extract. Top it up with more hot water throughout the day and your home will smell incredible for hours.

If you’d like the candle warmer I use, comment CANDLE and I’ll DM you the link. Make sure you’re following me so I can send it to you 💌

A simple laundry hack that can help speed up drying time 🧺✨

Halfway through the drying cycle, add a clean, dry towel to the dryer. It absorbs excess moisture, helping your clothes dry faster and making the rest of the cycle more efficient.

Such an easy trick, but it can make a big difference!

#LaundryHack #LaundryTips #DryerHack #CleaningHacks #HomeHacksWithCarolina

Laundry hack 🧺✨

Here’s how I stop fitted sheets from twisting around everything else in the washer and dryer. Just gather the corners together, secure them with a hair tie, and wash and dry as usual.

Such a simple trick, but it helps keep your laundry from turning into one big tangled mess!

#LaundryHack #LaundryTips #LaundryRoutine #HomeHacksWithCarolina #CleaningHacks

How to clean your home naturally 🍋🌿✨

Don’t throw away those citrus peels just yet! This simple infused cleaning spray is one of my favourite ways to make use of ingredients that would otherwise end up in the bin.

Recipe:
• Citrus peels
• Equal parts white vinegar and water
• Fresh rosemary

Add everything to a spray bottle and let it infuse for 3–5 days before using.

Use on countertops, sinks and other hard surfaces, and have fun experimenting with different citrus and herb combinations to create your own scent.

#NaturalCleaning #CleaningHacks #HomeHacksWithCarolina #DIYCleaning #CleaningTips
